title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at SigTuple South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at SigTuple South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple South Asia Partners:
SigTuple South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple South Asia Partners!
